Your bar. Our
curation.

"Your venue already has a story. We write the chapter where it becomes a destination — for the right crowd, on the right night."

NightLife Groove
Venue Partners

Every kind of space

🍸

Bars & Cocktail Lounges

Transform slow weeknights into must-attend evenings. We curate themed nights, live sessions, and DJ residencies perfectly matched to your bar's personality and crowd.

🍽️

Restaurants

Add a cultural dimension to dining — supper clubs, live music dinners, chef's table evenings with ambient performances. We make your restaurant a destination beyond the menu.

🏙️

Rooftops & Terraces

Sunset sessions, full moon parties, seasonal series. We leverage your sky and skyline to create evenings that sell out — and keep people coming back.

Journal

Insights for venue owners & night lovers

#1 · April 2025 · 8 min

How to turn your restaurant into a Friday night destination

The three elements every venue needs before hosting its first event — and what most owners miss.

#2 · March 2025 · 5 min

What makes a night worth going out for?

On curation, atmosphere, and why the best events feel inevitable — not accidental.

About

Where venue meets
vision.

NightLife Groove was built on one belief: that great venues are underleveraged cultural assets. We exist to change that — one curated night at a time.

We work with some of the most interesting bars, restaurants, and hospitality spaces across India — helping them discover what kind of event venue they could be, then building toward it with intention.

We enter every partnership as architects, not operators. Our job is to understand the space, the DNA of the venue, and the crowd it deserves — then design backwards from there.

For those looking to attend: every event we promote has been personally curated. We don't list everything — we list what's worth your evening. The right room, the right artist, the right night.

Based in Mumbai. Operating across Delhi, Bangalore, Goa, Pune, and Hyderabad.

What we hold to

01

Venue over volume

We partner with fewer venues and go deeper into each relationship.

02

Atmosphere as revenue

The right event increases covers, retention, and brand equity — not just ticket sales.

03

Artist-forward

We represent talent with care — their reputation is ours too.

04

City as canvas

Every city has underserved cultural appetite. We find it and feed it.

The people

Arjun Mehta

Founder & Director

Priya Sinha

Mia Kaur

Creative Direction

For Venue Owners

What we can do
for your space.

Three ways we work with restaurants, bars, and hospitality venues to create events that drive footfall, brand, and revenue.

Bars & Restaurants

Event Curation

We design and produce full-scale events in your venue — from concept and artist booking to night-of production. You serve; we create the moment.

→

Strategic Partnership

Night Consultancy

Not sure what kind of events your venue should host? We audit your space, understand your brand, and build a programming strategy that fits — from monthly residencies to seasonal series.

→

Artist Booking

Talent Placement

We match the right artists to your space and brand — curating performances that elevate your venue's identity and create loyal regulars.

→
Service — Event Curation

We turn your venue
into an event.

From the first conversation to the final chord, we handle everything — so your team can focus on delivering great hospitality while we deliver an unforgettable atmosphere.

Our process

01

Venue Audit

We assess your space, capacity, existing brand, and current audience to identify the right event format.

02

Concept Design

We develop the event narrative, theme, and atmosphere that fits your venue's character and target crowd.

03

Artist Booking

We source and confirm talent from our curated roster — matched precisely to the mood you're building.

04

Promotion

Targeted outreach across social, curated mailing lists, and our own event-goer community.

05

Night-of Production

We're on-site. Sound, staging, artist liaison, guest flow — all managed so your staff can focus on service.

Service — Night Consultancy

Strategy for
your venue.

We help bars and restaurants discover what kind of event space they should become — then build the programming roadmap to get there.

Who this is for

Venue owners who know they want to host events, but don't know where to start — or haven't found the right format yet.

What we offer

01

Space Assessment

Understanding what your venue can physically and acoustically support — and what it naturally lends itself to.

02

Event Identity

Positioning your venue in the local nightlife ecosystem — what kind of nights make sense for your brand and neighborhood.

03

Programming Calendar

A considered event calendar — monthly, quarterly, or seasonal — built to grow your audience consistently.

04

Revenue Framework

How to structure ticket pricing, covers, artist fees, and F&B uplift to make events genuinely profitable.

Service — Talent Placement

The right artist
for your room.

We match artists from our curated roster to venues that suit their sound — creating residencies, one-offs, and ongoing relationships that benefit both sides.

How we work

01

Curation

We shortlist artists from our roster whose sound, style, and draw matches your venue's vibe and capacity.

02

Booking

We handle all negotiations, contracts, technical riders, and scheduling — zero admin on your end.

03

Residencies

Building loyal, recurring audiences through monthly or quarterly artist residencies at your venue.

04

Co-Promotion

Access to our event-goer community and social channels to drive discovery and ticket sales for your night.

Upcoming Events

Nights worth
going out for.

Every event here has been handpicked. No generic gigs — only curated evenings in interesting venues across Indian cities.

01

Sunday, 27 Apr · Bandra, Mumbai · ₹800 onwards

Sunday Soul Sessions — Live Jazz Brunch

An intimate jazz brunch at The Ivory Bar, featuring a rotating quartet and a bottomless brunch menu. Perfect for slow Sunday mornings done right.

→
02

Friday, 2 May · Aerocity, Delhi · ₹1200 onwards

Skyline Sundowners — Rooftop Edition

Sunset cocktails, a deep-house DJ set, and a curated small-plates menu from Altitude Bar's kitchen. One of Delhi's most-awaited monthly rooftop events.

→
03

Saturday, 10 May · Indiranagar, Bangalore · ₹1500 onwards

Frequency — The Quarterly Electronic Night

Our quarterly flagship underground electronic night returns to The Cellar. Featuring VØLTEX and two surprise acts across two rooms, from 10pm to 4am.

→
04

Thursday, 15 May · Juhu, Mumbai · ₹2000 onwards

Chef's Table & Sound — An Immersive Dining Evening

A seven-course tasting menu by Chef Arora, paired with a live ambient performance by Nyx. Limited to 30 covers — reserve early.

→
05

Saturday, 24 May · Calangute, Goa · ₹600 onwards

Moonrise Sessions — Full Moon Beach Bar Night

A full moon gathering on Goa's north coast, hosted by Aura Collective. Afro-house, open-air dancing, and bar food until midnight.

→

Want early access to new events?

Join the inner circle.

believe in.

Get Started

Let's create
something together.

Whether you own a venue, you're looking for your next night out, or you're an artist looking for the right stage — we'd love to hear from you.

Response time

We respond to all serious enquiries within 48 hours. All conversations held in confidence.

We'll be in touch within 48 hours. In the meantime, explore upcoming events.
